case_title: MOISES PEREZ PEREZ VS. RONY PEREZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED DEC-04-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RONY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY PEREZ PEREZ, MOISES AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
